title: DRW MD-DRW-520: RF Antenna Integration
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-520 Rev E — RF Antenna Integration

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1122, P-1123, P-1130, P-1131, P-1132.
4. Drawn by Priya Nair, checked by Rowan Ellery, approved by Felix Herrera.
